title: Get the assets of a partner
content:
Use this endpoint to get assets that you have shared with a partner, or assets that are shared by a partner. You need to be an Admin of the Business Center. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path|/v1.2/bc/partner/asset/get/| /v1.3/bc/partner/asset/get/ |Request parameter data type|`bc_id`: number
`partner_id`: number|`bc_id`: string
`partner_id`: string| |Response parameter data type|`asset_id`: number |`asset_id`: string| |New response parameter|/| `advertiser_account_type`: string| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/partner/asset/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token{Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required} | string | Business Center ID | |partner_id {Required} | string | Partner Business Center ID | |asset_type {Required} | string | Asset type.

Enum values: `ADVERTISER`, `CATALOG`. | |share_type {Required} | string | Share type.

Enum values:
  • `SHARED`: Assets that are shared with you by a partner
  • `SHARING`: Assets that you share with a partner
| |filtering | object | Filtering by keyword | #|keyword | string | Keyword you want the assets filtered by | |page | number| Current page number. Default value: 1| |page_size | number| Page size. Default value: 10 | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --get -H "Access-Token:xxx" \ --data-urlencode "bc_id=BC_ID" \ --data-urlencode "partner_id=PARTNER_ID" \ --data-urlencode "asset_type=ASSET_TYPE" \ --data-urlencode "share_type=SHARE_TYPE" \ --data-urlencode "filtering={\"keyword\": \"KEYWORD\"}" \ --data-urlencode "page=PAGE" \ --data-urlencode "page_size=PAGE_SIZE" \ https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/partner/asset/get/ (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number | Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string | Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |request_id|string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | |data |object| Returned data. | #| list | object[] | List of partner assets | ##| asset_id | string | Asset ID.
  • If the `asset_type` is `ADVERTISER`, this is the advertiser ID.
  • If the `asset_type` is `CATALOG`, this is the catalog ID. | ##| asset_type | string | Asset type.

    Enum values: `ADVERTISER`, `CATALOG`. | ##| asset_name | string | Asset name. | ##| advertiser_role | string | Returned only when `asset_type` is `ADVERTISER`.

    Ad account role.

    Enum values: `ADMIN`, `OPERATOR`, `ANALYST`. | ##|advertiser_account_type |string|Type of the ad account.

    Enum values: `RESERVATION` (reservation ad account), `AUCTION`(auction ad account).| ##| catalog_role | string | Returned when `asset_type` is `CATALOG`.

    Business Center user's permissions to the catalog.

    Enum values:
    • `ADMIN`: The Business Center user has Admin permissions to the catalog.
    • `AD_PROMOTE`: The Business Center user can only use the catalog for promotions.
    | #|page_info|object|Pagination information | ##|page|number|Current page number. | ##|page_size|number|Page size | ##|total_number|number|Total number of results | ##|total_page|number|Total pages of results | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": {} } (/code) ```
